channel.title: HackSys Inc - A Vulnerability Research Company

image.title: HackSys Inc - A Vulnerability Research Company

item.title: Foxit PDF Reader - Use after Free - Remote Code Execution Exploit
item.description: Foxit PDF Reader is vulnerable to use after free vulnerability causing remote code execution
item.content:encoded: Foxit PDF Reader is vulnerable to use after free vulnerability causing remote code execution
item.author: info@hacksys.io (Krishnakant Patil)
info@hacksys.io (Ashfaq Ansari)

item.title: Adobe Reader - XFA - ANSI-Unicode Confusion Information Leak
item.description: Adobe Reader DC is vulnerable to Out of Bounds Read bug, caused by treating ANSI string as Unicode in XFA
item.content:encoded: Adobe Reader DC is vulnerable to Out of Bounds Read bug, caused by treating ANSI string as Unicode in XFA
item.author: info@hacksys.io (Ashfaq Ansari)
info@hacksys.io (Krishnakant Patil)
